contract.north_star: Complete and monetize Hoch Agent Swarm / HASF with verified autonomous execution, live command center, secure relay, evidence ledger, and operator-trusted automation.
completion_definition: PERT dashboard shows current project truth
Agents have assigned owners and RACI
Tests prove backend, relay, doctrine, mission execution, UI, and sustainment
Michael no longer has to manually copy/paste routine commands

tasks.title: Runtime truth and backend stability
tasks.description: Ensure SQLite database connectivity, proper WAL journaling mode, and multi-threaded request safety.

tasks.description: Intake goal processing, boundary constraints check, and pod authorization pipeline.

tasks.title: Relay / HOCH-200 compute node
tasks.description: VPS relay stack deployment, Tailscale-only port 3012 binding, and connection health proxy.

tasks.title: Doctrine DB and brain initialization
tasks.description: Seed doctrine_rules table and guarantee initialization runs prior to module imports.

tasks.title: Agent accountability and trust scoring
tasks.description: Rule action validation filters, database record auditing, and trust scores grading.

tasks.title: UI command center / dark cockpit
tasks.description: Rich dark aesthetic cockpit, live status terminal overlay, and models health checks.

tasks.title: Evidence and release ledger
tasks.description: Generate SHA256 validated evidence packs, SBOM files, and SLSA subject-provenance logs.

tasks.title: Security / no public exposure
tasks.description: Validate UFW firewall limits, restrict public SSH to home IP, and run Semgrep scans.

tasks.title: Backup and restore
tasks.description: Hourly SQLite database snapshots, file backups, and manual restore validation drills.

tasks.title: Restart and failover drills
tasks.description: Simulate local primary host outages and promote secondary VPS routing failover.

tasks.title: Monetization sidecar
tasks.description: Integrate Stripe webhooks, billing configurations, and subscription status verification.
tasks.blocker: Production deployment of Stripe monetization code blocked by Michael approval

hoch_hasf_soccer_product_model.name: HOCH HASF Soccer Intelligence Platform
hoch_hasf_soccer_product_model.product_hypothesis: Applying computer vision and AI analytics to youth and amateur soccer videos provides actionable coaching metrics, injury avoidance, and parental insights that traditional scouting lacks.
hoch_hasf_soccer_product_model.app_store_positioning: The Ultimate AI Assistant for Soccer Coaches and Parents — track tactical drills, analyze play patterns, and enforce Jayanthi injury boundaries from mobile video uploads.
soccer_intelligence_features: Computer vision tracking of player positioning and spacing mesh
Drill library with tactical movement tutorials
Weekly workload analytics vs age to avoid physical overuse
prediction_risk_disclaimer_requirements: AI prediction data is for athletic development only.
Not a substitute for professional medical/clinical injury diagnoses.
Compliance with local sports betting restrictions (no prediction outcomes sold to gambling operators).

training_education_mode.description: Interactive parent and child onboarding tutorials detailing soccer rules and tactical fundamentals.

data_source_assumptions: Amateur-captured video frame rates of 30-60 FPS
hoch_hasf_soccer_product_model.competitive_differentiation: Privacy-focused design: video frame calculations are processed locally on the client's device, never exposing child identification metadata to cloud databases (COPPA zero-data stance).
hoch_hasf_soccer_product_model.mvp_readiness_state: Frontend layout and visual enclaves are complete; Supabase backend authentication and Stripe checkout routes are missing.
required_validation: Validate offline computer vision processing performance on mobile nodes
